name: Session Recap Extractor
description: Parses native session summaries to extract actionable items (payment verification, human escalation, unresolved issues) and sends notifications
author: Evonic

variables.name: WEBHOOK_URL
variables.label: Notification Webhook URL
variables.description: HTTP endpoint to receive extracted actionable items (POST)

variables.name: NOTIFY_AGENT_ID
variables.label: Notify via Agent ID
variables.description: Agent ID to send admin notifications through (leave empty to skip)

variables.name: NOTIFY_CHANNEL_ID
variables.label: Notify Channel Type or ID
variables.description: Channel type (e.g. 'telegram', 'whatsapp') or internal channel UUID. The first active channel matching this type will be used.

variables.name: NOTIFY_USER_ID
variables.label: Admin User ID
variables.description: External user ID of the admin to notify on the channel

variables.name: MIN_MESSAGES
variables.label: Min messages before analysis
variables.description: Skip analysis for sessions with fewer summarized messages
